data.title: In Xi'an, Mayors from Around the World Explore Pathways for Silk Road Cities to Balance Ancient Heritage with Modern Industry
data.description: In Xi'An, China, on April 29, 2026, the 2026 Global Mayors Dialogue•Xi'an began, with participation from mayors across various nations. The event took place in Xi'an, known as the origin of the ancient Silk Road. The theme of the dialogue was "Starting Point of the Ancient Silk Road and Harmonious...".

data.title: SINEXCEL 1725kW PCS Powers a C&I Storage Project with 107.12MW/428.48MWh Deployment
data.description: In Guangyuan, China, SINEXCEL has recently finalized the grid connection of a notable battery energy storage system with a capacity of 107.12MW and 428.48MWh in Sichuan Province. This project, undertaken for Zhongfu Industrial, a major aluminum producer, stands out as a significant commercial and industrial BESS initiative in the country.

data.title: Bregal Milestone Announces Majority Growth Investment in CoreGo, a Leading European Open-Loop Payment and Event Technology Company
data.description: In London, Bregal Milestone, a prominent European software growth private equity firm, has disclosed a significant strategic growth investment in CoreGo Oy ("CoreGo" or the "Company"), a top provider of open-loop payments and integrated technology solutions for festivals, sports events, and venues throughout Europe. The Company, established in Helsinki in 2015 by Hannu Elomaa and CTO Nikoteemu Väänänen, has developed a distinguished open-loop payment infrastructure and event technology.

data.title: The Jury Has Been Announced for the Third Edition of the Reply AI Film Festival, Dedicated to the Best Short Films Generated With Artificial Intelligence
data.description: In Turin, Italy, the international group Reply [EXM, STAR: REY] is known for creating innovative business models with AI and supporting youth in technology exploration. The third Reply AI Film Festival has announced its jury, overseeing a competition for creatives and filmmakers to make short films using AI tools. Gab will head the jury panel for this international contest.

data.title: IOWN Global Forum Gathers Industry Leaders in Sydney to Align Business Demand with Photonic Breakthroughs
data.description: The 2026 Annual Member Meeting of the IOWN Global Forum in Sydney showcased advancements and future plans for digital networks. With over 250 attendees from 180+ member organizations, the event focused on enhancing shared architectural designs, integration methods, and deployment strategies for photonics-driven technologies. Hosted in Australia's tech hub, the forum highlighted progress and collaboration within the industry.

data.title: FICO UK Credit Card Market Report: February 2026
data.description: In London, a recent credit card data analysis by global analytics software leader FICO revealed trends in consumer spending following a post-Christmas decline in January. Despite a typical recovery in spending, the analysis highlighted ongoing affordability challenges observed in 2025, indicated by decreasing payment rates and higher balance levels for accounts with missed payments compared to the previous year. This situation might escalate due to the increasing energy prices. Notably, spending showed a 5% increase in the analyzed data.

data.title: RIBI 2026: the asset management industry's most valuable asset is now identity.
data.description: The latest edition of the Responsible Investment Brand Index (RIBI™) has assessed 632 asset managers globally, indicating a pivotal moment for the industry. Notably, France has emerged as the top-ranking country on the index. Southern Europe has seen significant progress, with the region making the most notable advancements. Additionally, there have been improvements noted in Brand Private Assets companies.

data.title: Greywolf Therapeutics and Genomics Launch Strategic Relationship to Develop First‑in‑Class Treatments for Autoimmune Diseases
data.description: Recent studies have identified ERAP1 and ERAP2 as promising therapeutic targets linked to various autoimmune illnesses. A genomics project is underway to create a comprehensive genetic database aimed at studying the impact of ERAP variants on the susceptibility of individuals to multiple autoimmune diseases. This initiative will provide valuable insights into...

data.title: DB HiTek to Participate in PCIM 2026, Strengthening Its Presence in the European Market
data.description: The biggest power semiconductor exhibition in Europe is scheduled to take place in Nuremberg, Germany, from June 9th to 11th. The event will feature the newest advancements in SiC and GaN technologies, emphasizing its power semiconductor abilities. DB HiTek, a prominent 8-inch pure-play company based in SEOUL, South Korea, will be a key participant at the exhibition. The event is expected to attract a large number of industry professionals and enthusiasts from around the world.

data.title: YamSoft Launches AI-Powered Payment Capabilities Following €2.35M EU Innovation Grant
data.description: YamSoft, an AI specialist from Kaunas, Lithuania, revealed on April 29, 2026, the launch of a series of AI payment features ready for implementation. These capabilities were created as part of their EU AI Innovation Grant, a highly sought-after grant with a significant total funding amount.
Company eliminates 1 million of its own shares to reduce share capital.

data.title: MiTAC Computing Returns to OCP EMEA 2026 with New OCP Liquid Cooled Servers and Software Integration
data.description: MiTAC Computing Technology, a leading global provider of high-performance and energy-efficient server solutions and a subsidiary of MiTAC Holdings Corporation (TWSE:3706), will be participating in the OCP EMEA Summit 2026 in Barcelona, Spain on April 29-30. The event will bring together industry experts to discuss the latest developments in the server technology sector.
